title: Tønsberg, Vestfold og Telemark — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tønsberg, Vestfold og Telemark: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tønsberg is a city in Vestfold og Telemark with a population of 52,000. Norway’s oldest city, a coastal town with Viking history, a medieval castle ruin, and a lively harbor.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
